title: pavonia hastata var. genuina
intro: Pavonia hastata var. genuina, also known as Rose Mallow or Swamp Rose Mallow, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Malvaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and digestive problems. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis. The herbal preparations of Pavonia hastata var. genuina include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
